name: Avatar The Last Airbender RPG
description:
Lorebook/Multiple Intros Included

Avatar: The Harmony Restoration Era – An RPG

The Hundred Year War is over. The dust of a fallen empire has settled, and a fragile peace now blankets the world. But this is not a time of rest; it is a time of rebuilding. The scars of a century of conflict run deep, and the peace between the Four Nations is an intricate tapestry woven from political tension, old hatreds, and the desperate hope for a better future. The age of heroes is not over—it has just gotten more complicated.

You are an unexpected variable in this new era. You may be a bender, struggling to find your place in a world that no longer needs you as a weapon. You may be a non-bender, using your wit and strength to carve out a life in the shadows of legends. Or you may be something else entirely, a soul whose destiny is intertwined with the balance of the world itself.

Team Avatar is no longer a scrappy group of kids on the run. Aang is a fully realized Avatar, navigating the treacherous world of politics. Katara is a master and healer, acting as the moral compass for a new age. Sokka is a brilliant strategist, helping to shape the future of the world. Toph is the undisputed master of her element, a legend in her own right. Their bond is the bedrock of this new era, and you have just entered their orbit.

Intro 1: Isekai

Intro 2: Dinner with the avatar gang (you’re part of the team.)

Intro 3: user is found by the group, alone out in the woods

Intro 4: user is sitting in on a argument between Zuko and Aang over the fire nation colonies in the earth kingdom (political flavor intro)

Intro 5: It’s Christmas (winter solstice) and you and the Gaang are celebrating

Last intro is a create your own. Here’s a good OOC to use when making one: Great and now another intro message. [I need you to create an intro message. Refer to {user} as {user} or with (your pronouns). The format of your messages should be like this with quotes between quotation marks (“Example”) and actions between asterisks (*Example*). Don’t speak or act for {user}, such as gasping, widening eyes, etc. Make it long. (The stuff you want here)]

This bot is basically cuz I hate that there’s no show about this period and I want a good bot on it. You can see from the script bio, there is a lot of stuff included (the counts are abit low, I realized later I missed a couple sections but I am not recounting rn). The entries are specific and detailed, but still token efficient at around 120 tokens average. Everyone and everything from the cabbage man to swamp bending to pao sho. I got it. If you think I missed something, it’s prolly the LLM fucking up but please feel free to comment and I’ll either let you know that I screwed up (and am fixing it) or that your LLM is the issue and to OOC/edit it away

This is the last bot till after Christmas. Happy holidays everyone!

Teaser for the next bot

Man I loved making this avatar RPG

Characters included:

Aang, Admiral Zhao, Appa, Aunt Wu, Avatar Kuruk, Avatar Kyoshi, Avatar Roku, Avatar Wan, Avatar Yangchen, Azula, Bato, Cabbage Merchant, Chief Arnook, Combustion Man, Dai Li Agents, Earth King Kuei, Fang, Fire Lord Azulon, Fire Lord Ozai, Fire Lord Sozin, General Fong, Gran Gran (Kanna), Guru Pathik, Hakoda, Hama, Haru, Hei Bai, Iroh, Jeong Jeong, Jet, Joo Dee, June, Katara, Koh the Face Stealer, Lion Turtle, Lo and Li, Long Feng, Longshot, Mai, Master Pakku, Master Piandao, Meng, Momo, Monk Gyatso, Nyla, Princess Yue, Professor Zei, Ran and Shaw, Sage Shyu, Smellerbee, Sokka, Suki, Teo, The Boulder, The Duke, The Mechanist, Toph Beifong, Tui and La, Ty Lee, Ursa, Wan Shi Tong, Xin Fu, Yon Rha, Zuko
